title: Ensemble handoff task packet
description: Front-matter of a handoffs/inbox/HX-*.md consultant packet. Single source of truth (spec v1.2 §5.1). Validated by /handoff, tier-gate.yml, and the poller on claim.

id.description: HX-<YYYY-MMDD>-<slug>, unique per repo. slug kebab, <=24 chars.

requested_by.description: GitHub handle of the requesting consultant.

route_hint.description: Model route only. api = Anthropic (v1). local-bulk reserved/deferred (no vLLM yet) and rejected by the poller.

workflow.description: Dispatch shape (DELTA-1 §11/D4). single = one dispatch → one result PR (current). report = the staged outline→gates→QA→copy→render pipeline. artefact = interactive HTML deliverable where the HTML is the source of truth (reserved).

style_refs.description: Pinned style/voice/template inputs (repo-relative), e.g. brand-voice + report template, applied by the copy-edit stage.

stage_tiers.description: Optional per-stage review-tier overrides for a report workflow, e.g. { "outline": "light" }.

deadline.description: ISO8601 timestamp or the literal string 'none'.

inputs.description: Repo-relative paths. LFS pointers are fine.

retries.description: Incremented on rejection-return by the janitor.

context.description: Optional PR numbers / packet ids to read for context.
